title: Reobrix 1000 RR Motorbike Building Toy for Adults, 1:8 Scale Technics Super Motorcycle Model Brick Set with Stand, 99040 Vehicle Collection Decor Gifts for Teens Boys Childs 14+ (949 Pcs)
features: 【Reobrix Motorcycle 1000 RR】Reobrix 99040 Motorcycle accurately reproduces the real car shape at a ratio of 1:8, classic red, white and blue color scheme: highly restored 1000RR motorcycle, adopting the iconic red, white and blue color scheme, is an ideal choice for motorcycle enthusiasts and collectors.

【Exquisite Details Restoration】This motorcycle building blocks carefully restore the details of windshield, tires, brake pads, gearbox, chains, etc., and the front of the car can be steering to increase playability. Equipped with a display base in the same color body, it is a perfect display collection
【Play and Display】After the assembly of this motorcycle building block toy can be played as a movable model toy, or it can be decorated as an exquisite static exhibit, providing a dual fun experience

【Easy to Get Accomplishment】 The packaging box contains clear color instructions, 949 pieces of particles and ABS material, and can easily get a sense of accomplishment within a few hours for children 14+ or adults. You can also enjoy building with your children. Whether you are a collector, motorcycle fan or architecture enthusiast, this model offers endless entertainment possibilities

【Unique Creative Gift】The Reobrix motorcycle blocks use exquisite packaging design and are the best gift for Christmas, Valentine's Day, birthday or special occasions, whether for teenagers or adults, this product can inspire creativity and hours of fun
